title: Playground Workbench
concept: A three-pane workbench that treats creation, saved Playgrounds, the live WordPress frame, and Site Manager operations as one continuous workspace instead of separate modal-first surfaces.
focus: live site centered as the primary work object
right-side operations inspector for Site Manager tasks
modal flows only for high-intent starts, save, export, and gallery browsing
flows: browse Blueprint gallery and category filters
save to browser or local directory
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection messaging
save modal with browser and local directory options
rename and delete saved Playground actions
URL path input and refresh control
WordPress, PHP, language, older version, network, and multisite settings
destructive reset and saved reload messaging
file browser with create, upload, browse, tree, and code editor affordances
Blueprint file view with copy link, download bundle, and run controls
database driver, SQLite path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin controls
